headline: AbbVie's Deal with Apogee; Regenxbio Moves on Gene Therapy Drug | Stock Movers
summary: On this episode of Stock Movers with Nathan Hager: - Apogee (APGE) shares are soaring on news AbbVie is closing in on a nearly $11 billion deal to buy inflammatory disease drug developer Apogee Therapeutics. That's also according to a Financial Times report. - Regenxbio (RGNX) shares are moving on news Regenxbio aligned with the FDA on next steps for a potential accelerated approval of Navsunli, a gene therapy for Mucopolysaccharidosis II, with the FDA confirming the company doesn't need to conduct additional studies of the drug. - SpaceX (SPCX) is lower this morning, continuing its slide after its record IPO.

content.title: AbbVie's Deal with Apogee; Regenxbio Moves on Gene Therapy Drug | Stock Movers
content.description:
On this episode of Stock Movers with Nathan Hager:

- Apogee (APGE) shares are soaring on news AbbVie is closing in on a nearly $11 billion deal to buy inflammatory disease drug developer Apogee Therapeutics. That's also according to a Financial Times report.

- Regenxbio (RGNX) shares are moving on news Regenxbio aligned with the FDA on next steps for a potential accelerated approval of Navsunli, a gene therapy for Mucopolysaccharidosis II, with the FDA confirming the company doesn't need to conduct additional studies of the drug.

- SpaceX (SPCX) is lower this morning, continuing its slide after its record IPO.
content.summary: On this episode of Stock Movers with Nathan Hager: - Apogee (APGE) shares are soaring on news AbbVie is closing in on a nearly $11 billion deal to buy inflammatory disease drug developer Apogee Therapeutics. That's also according to a Financial Times report. - Regenxbio (RGNX) shares are moving on news Regenxbio aligned with the FDA on next steps for a potential accelerated approval of Navsunli, a gene therapy for Mucopolysaccharidosis II, with the FDA confirming the company doesn't need to conduct additional studies of the drug. - SpaceX (SPCX) is lower this morning, continuing its slide after its record IPO.

headline: Questex’s DPHARM Announces Senior Leadership and Keynotes for the 16th Annual Conference
summary: BOSTON, June 22, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- DPHARM, the leading innovation event for clinical trial operation executives, announces the 16th annual conference agenda including its senior leadership and keynotes. DPHARM which is now part of Questex’s Fierce Life Sciences, takes place September 15-16, 2026, at the Sheraton Boston Hotel. The first line up of senior level clinical operation executives include: Jennifer Sheller, SVP, Head of Global Clinical Trial Operations, Global Clinical Development

content.title: Questex’s DPHARM Announces Senior Leadership and Keynotes for the 16th Annual Conference
content.summary: BOSTON, June 22, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- DPHARM, the leading innovation event for clinical trial operation executives, announces the 16th annual conference agenda including its senior leadership and keynotes. DPHARM which is now part of Questex’s Fierce Life Sciences, takes place September 15-16, 2026, at the Sheraton Boston Hotel. The first line up of senior level clinical operation executives include: Jennifer Sheller, SVP, Head of Global Clinical Trial Operations, Global Clinical Development

headline: AbbVie to Acquire Apogee Therapeutics, Deepening Immunology Portfolio
summary: AbbVie (NYSE: ABBV) and Apogee Therapeutics (NASDAQ: APGE) ("Apogee") today announced they have entered into a definitive agreement under which AbbVie will acquire Apogee and its diverse pipeline of multiple clinical-stage candidates in development across inflammatory and immunological diseases, including atopic dermatitis (AD) and asthma. The acquisition complements AbbVie's existing immunology portfolio and accelerates AbbVie's clinical presence in the respiratory space.

content.title: AbbVie to Acquire Apogee Therapeutics, Deepening Immunology Portfolio
content.summary: AbbVie (NYSE: ABBV) and Apogee Therapeutics (NASDAQ: APGE) ("Apogee") today announced they have entered into a definitive agreement under which AbbVie will acquire Apogee and its diverse pipeline of multiple clinical-stage candidates in development across inflammatory and immunological diseases, including atopic dermatitis (AD) and asthma. The acquisition complements AbbVie's existing immunology portfolio and accelerates AbbVie's clinical presence in the respiratory space.

headline: AbbVie (ABBV) Is Buying Apogee Therapeutics For $10.9 Billion
summary: AbbVie (NYSE:ABBV) has agreed to acquire Apogee Therapeutics in a cash deal valued at US$10.9b. The transaction focuses on expanding AbbVie's immunology and respiratory disease pipeline with several clinical-stage candidates. The deal is described as AbbVie's largest acquisition in more than five years and includes a premium to Apogee's recent trading levels. AbbVie is a large biopharmaceutical company with a long-standing focus on immunology, oncology, neuroscience, and other specialty...
